description: Complete campaign input across blog, LinkedIn, and email.
Minimal valid input should still produce review notes and safe planning output.
Multiple platforms with uneven cadence should produce platform balance notes.
Dense posting frequency in a short range should be flagged for capacity review.
Impossible or overloaded cadence must not be silently accepted.
Duplicate ideas should be deduped or flagged.
Strict exclusions and constraints should be carried into briefs.
Prompt injection in existing ideas must be treated as data only.
Sensitive topics should receive review notes and safety flags.
A very narrow date range should keep dates valid and flag gaps if needed.
